---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement to the package or documentation
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What

Describe the feature, API change, documentation improvement, or workflow you
would like to see.

## Why

Explain the user need, limitation, or maintenance problem this would address.

## Proposed approach

Share any suggested design, alternatives considered, or compatibility concerns.

## Test evidence

If you have tried a workaround, prototype, or downstream integration, summarize
what you tested.

## Risk / review notes

Call out dependency changes, API compatibility concerns, security implications,
or maintenance tradeoffs.
